/usr/bin/ar qc liboftla.a CMakeFiles/oftla.dir/lin_alg_base.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftla.dir/native_la.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftla.dir/petsc_la.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftla.dir/deriv_matrices.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftla.dir/solver_base.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftla.dir/native_solvers.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftla.dir/petsc_solvers.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftla.dir/superlu_bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/oftla.dir/superlu_dist_bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/oftla.dir/umfpack_bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/oftla.dir/mkl_bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/oftla.dir/oft_arpack.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftla.dir/oft_lu.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftla.dir/lin_alg_utils.F90.o CMakeFiles/oftla.dir/solver_utils.F90.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liboftla.a
